annotations.name: claude-multiselect-checkbox-question
notes: Captured from a disposable Claude Code session using AskUserQuestion with multiSelect enabled.
This is the user-reported checkbox shape whose description text must remain clickable in NotchApp.
Live verification confirmed Claude's documented Enter key toggles the focused checkbox; Space can toggle the previously focused row after navigation.
The prompt was captured before any checkbox was toggled and was cancelled without submission.
option_descriptions: Harden error handling and edge cases so the blog builds and renders dependably.
Optimize build output, asset loading, and page render speed.
Add semantic markup, alt text, and keyboard/contrast support for all users.
Expand CLAUDE.md and inline docs so future work is easier to pick up.
annotations.title: Which improvements should we include?
